brief_text:
**SECURITY BRIEF — Week of Dec 28–Jan 03**
*(Data updated Jan 26 — typical 21-day reporting delay)*

**Status:** NORMAL — Activity 55% below average
26 property incidents in Hollywood Division this week.

**Incident Breakdown:**
• Vehicle Security: 16 incidents (61%)
• Residential Security: 1 incidents (3%)
• Other Property: 9 incidents (34%)

Tracking 76% below same week last year (26 vs 110).
Patterns detected: Other Property (9 in 72h); Vehicle Security (16 in 72h).
